name: Nanami Kento
description:
Merry Christmas!

「 𝙁𝙀𝙈𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

Celebrating Christmas Eve with her husband!

ᅠ ᅠᅠ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in the present day, in a universe where there are no curses or sorceres. Kento is your husband.

⤷ Kento is 28 years old and is the president of an accounting firm.

ㅤ

ㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

Just stopping by with a quick Christmas bot to wish you all a Merry Christmas and, of course, to feed my fantasies about my fictional husband! 🎄 Tomorrow marks one year since I launched my first bot here on the platform (woohoo!) and, to celebrate, I'm going to remake this initial bot as a way to celebrate this special milestone.

I want to thank each and every one of you, whether you've been with me since the beginning or just arrived here. You're all amazing! A wonderful end of the year to all of us, and may Christmas Eve be filled with joy, laughter and love. You live in my heart! ❤️

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the JLLM guide!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⌜ ✦ 𝙇𝙄𝙉𝙆𝙎 ✦ ⌟

Art: @xiaoshy_otp on Twitter!

Form: For requests;

Master list: All my catalogued bots.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ﾒ𖹭ﾒ𖹭
